▣

Sports Science Student Roadmap

As a Sports Science student, these are the skills that can help you stand out beyond the classroom. Follow this roadmap from Level 100 through Level 400.

Recommended Skills

Skills That Make You Competitive

▣

Technical Skills

Exercise Physiology Sports Biomechanics Performance Analysis Sports Nutrition
▤

Career Skills

Injury Prevention Data Analysis Coaching Science
▦

Industry Knowledge

Fitness Assessment Research Methods Sports Technology
Opportunities

Where These Skills Can Take You

01

Sports Science Internships

Start exploring sports science internships to build real-world experience early.

02

Research Assistant Roles

Start exploring research assistant roles to build real-world experience early.

03

NGO & Community Projects

Start exploring ngo & community projects to build real-world experience early.

04

Industry Pathways

Start exploring industry pathways to build real-world experience early.

Learning Roadmap

Your Path From Level 100 to Level 400

Follow this structured roadmap to build your skills progressively and stay ahead of your peers.

⚐

Level 100

Build Your Foundation

1Learn EXERCISE PHYSIOLOGY2Improve Communication3Join Communities
♕

Level 200

Develop Core Skills

1Practice SPORTS BIOMECHANICS2Build LinkedIn3Start Small Projects
♤

Level 300

Gain Experience

1Apply PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS2Get Internship3Build Portfolio
♠

Level 400

Launch Your Career

1Network Professionally2Apply for Opportunities3Prepare CV & Career Path
